name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Is It Happening?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=is_it_happening&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **_It appears that your pressure is working! Senate Republicans[just announced](https://www.action4liberty.com/senate_republicans_remove_mask_mandate_in_senate_chamber?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=is_it_happening&n=2) they will defy Governor Walz' Mask Mandate in the Senate Chambers. _** YOU are making them get tougher up at the Capitol? But we're not past the finish line yet. We still have to pass the **Never Again Bill**! **If I was writing the Senate Republican plan, here's what it would say:** **Step 1 - Publicly Defy Governor Walz' Orders (CHECK)** **Step 2 - REFUSE to pass a budget with Walz until the Never Again Bill is passed into law!** **Peter, there are ONLY 6 DAYS LEFT until the end of the Legislative Session. We are seeing positive movement our way, but we can't let up now!** If Gazelka and Senate Republicans agree to a budget deal in the next 6 days with Governor Walz, we'll head into the summer with Walz' unilateral emergency powers still in place. That means longer mask mandates and possibly, vaccine passports. We can't let this happen!!! Your Action 4 Liberty is continuing to put the pressure on Senate Republicans and vulnerable House Democrats so we ensure this NEVER HAPPENS AGAIN. **The Political Establishment would love for us to give up at this point. BUT WE REFUSE! Although, none of this matters if we don't have the funds to continue our massive pressure campaign. Can you[PLEASE DONATE](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=is_it_happening&n=3) to help us out.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=is_it_happening&n=4 "DONATE NOW!") [DONATE NOW!](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=is_it_happening&n=5)
---
Walz is holding onto his Emergency Powers for no reason other than to continue his unchecked control over you and me. This MUST STOP!
We see big government proponents across the country developing vaccine passport programs. I'm afraid nothing will stop Walz from implementing one here if he goes into the summer with his Emergency Powers still intact.
It's CRITICALLY IMPORTANT that we continue pressuring Senate Republicans and weak House Democrats. Action 4 Liberty puts our money where our mouth is - we've hired doorknockers and phonecallers across the state of Minnesota.
We also purchased digital ads.
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=is_it_happening&n=6)
_Don't let Walz' continue his reign of Unilateral Emergency Powers anymore. Support us today!_
[**Peter, help my team make more phone calls and boost up our ads in the final 6 days. Let's ELIMINATE Walz' Emergency Powers! Donate $25, $50 or $100 immediately to keep the pressure on politicians in St Paul.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=is_it_happening&n=7)
Thank you for your continued support!
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
**P.S. There are 6 days left of the legislative session and it's clear that your pressure is having an effect. But we're not past the finish line. Don't let the legislature adjourn without passing the Never Again Bill.[Help us increase our phone calling campaign and purchase more ads with a donation of $25, $50 or $100 immediately!](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=is_it_happening&n=8)**

name: Team AOC
subject: We answered your questions about the Green New Deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The Green New Deal is the most ambitious and transformative framework proposed by a member of Congress since Roosevelt’s New Deal.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210511-2072-header&t=1&akid=2072%2E2526796%2Emg8G4P)
The Green New Deal has gained strong support since its introduction in 2018.
But we know that many folks still have some questions about just exactly what the Green New Deal is, and what it will accomplish. So as Alexandria and Senator Markey reintroduced the resolution in Congress last month, we invited you to submit any questions that were on your mind. **Here’s answers to questions many of you had:**
**_How quickly will the Green New Deal lower U.S. carbon emissions?_**
Reducing carbon emissions is critical for saving our planet — the carbonization of our economy is responsible for extreme weather disasters like the wildfires in California, the winter storms in Texas, and devastating floods in the Midwest. **The Green New Deal would achieve net-zero greenhouse gas emissions through a fair and just transition for all communities and workers over 10 years.**
**_How will the Green New Deal create more jobs?_**
President Biden said it himself during his recent joint address: “When I think of climate change, I think of jobs.” **The Green New Deal would create millions of good-paying, union jobs in the green energy sector** — ensuring that workers who have kept our energy grids running will have good jobs to transition to, like wind energy technicians and solar photovoltaic installers.
**_How can I become an advocate for the Green New Deal?_**
We know that **a strong way to grow this movement and build support for the Green New Deal is to have conversations with the people closest to us and invest in deep canvassing.** Deep canvassing means taking the time to reach voters where they’re at and sharing longer, thoughtful, and persuasive two-way conversations about the issues they care about and talking through any questions and misunderstandings about the Green New Deal.
It’s also important that voters support candidates for office who will fight for a Green New Deal — and also make calls to their current Representatives and urge them to support the Green New Deal.
We’ve invested many of our resources into reaching voters right here in NY-14 and partnering with groups across the country to reach every voter and share with them the importance of passing the Green New Deal now.
[You can help us advocate for the Green New Deal by making a contribution today to power our deep canvassing work and keep AOC in Congress fighting for this transformative framework. Can you chip in $3?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210511?refcode=em20210511-2072-P&t=22&refcode2=2072_2526796_mg8G4P&akid=2072%2E2526796%2Emg8G4P)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210511?refcode=em20210511-2072-P&t=23&refcode2=2072_2526796_mg8G4P&akid=2072%2E2526796%2Emg8G4P)**
**Simply put, our country is facing both high unemployment and a disastrous climate crisis right now.** The Green New Deal tackles both by shifting our country's priority to ensuring high-wage jobs, net-zero emissions in 10 years, clean air and water for all, and much more.
We need a Green New Deal — now. And with your support, we can pass this transformative framework and start building a more sustainable future for all.
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210511?refcode=em20210511-2072-P&t=24&refcode2=2072_2526796_mg8G4P&akid=2072%2E2526796%2Emg8G4P)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2072%2E2526796%2Emg8G4P) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2072%2E2526796%2Emg8G4P) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2072%2E2526796%2Emg8G4P)
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=2072%2E2526796%2Emg8G4P)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2072%2E2526796%2Emg8G4P)

subject: A proposal to raise the gas tax...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ORTT FOR STATE SENATE
body:
Albany Democrats are proposing a massive new gas tax on New Yorkers | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/aeb637edde92/urgent-albany-budget-alert-10172144?e=9f843ba602)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Friends --

Albany Democrats recently put forward a proposal that would raise prices at the pump by 55 cents a gallon.

That's right, _they want to tax you more to fund their radical 'Green New Deal' agenda. _

Do they ever stop to think about what this would do to hardworking New Yorkers?

I took the time to survey my constituents about how this ridiculous proposal would impact them and I wanted to share some of the feedback:

_➡ "I am on a fixed income. How am I supposed to pay this new tax?"

➡ "This is ridiculous! The state needs to stop adding taxes on the working class."

➡ "My wife and I enjoy one evening out a week together. If this new tax passes it would all but cutout our once a week splurge."

➡ "If this happens, we are out of here."_

This is just a small sample of the hundreds of responses we have received so far. Please consider sharing our survey with your friends and family. You can find a link here >> **[GAS TAX SURVEY](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=e93db0c1ce&e=9f843ba602)**

Unfortunately, these are the types of policies being pushed under one-party rule in Albany. Policies that will hurt hardworking New Yorkers like you, kill jobs and cause more families and opportunities to flee the state.

**This regressive bill has overwhelming support by Senate Democrats in Albany. They want to pass this new tax NOW.**

Any elected official who would support a massive new tax on cash-strapped New York families should be fired. I am hoping you'll [help me make that happen.](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=efaab156e1&e=9f843ba602)

I know times are tough, but please consider making [a small contribution to help me](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=0cdeacc890&e=9f843ba602) defeat the out-of-touch politicians that support policies like this one.

Your contribution will go directly toward efforts to defeat the Albany politicians who want to impose a new tax that will increase your cost at the pump.
**[> > Chip in today to stop this radical new gas tax <<](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=3c00420769&e=9f843ba602)**
Thank you. Please know I will fight this proposal at every turn.

Senator Rob Ortt

**[P.S.](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=c24c04cb78&e=9f843ba602)[ This bill has already received a legislative hearing. We need to show the Democrats there is strong opposition to this proposal.

>> Click here to make an urgent contribution today and we will invest in efforts to defeat these politicians and their radical agenda.](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=9f8c024302&e=9f843ba602)**

Nancy Pelosi holds an iron grip on the House of Representatives - she can force through any bill Joe Biden or AOC tell her to - but, Chuck Schumer only has a ONE VOTE majority. It is much harder for him to take away your rights and force socialism on our nation. **_That doesn't mean he isn't going to try._** Socialist Democrats want to transform the very fabric of this great nation, but I'm here to stop them, and your support can make all the difference. I'm Congressman Mo Brooks, and I'm running for Senate in the great state of Alabama. * **Trillions** in a blue-state bailout to all of Joe Biden's friends,
* **Defunding the police** in your neighborhood,
* **Redefining gender** ,
* **Amnesty** for millions of illegal immigrants
* **A National Gun Registry** , AND a new ban on "assault rifles" (whatever they decide that means).
* A Bill to **grant statehood to the District of Columbia** , giving the Democrats two new **ULTRA-LIBERAL** Senators and a permanent majority in the Senate

**[Will you stand with President Trump and help me fight the radical Left in the U.S. Senate? We can save America with your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or just $45 TODAY!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57361730:67nrkQlNx:m:1:3103520637:DFAD3CE21829A6857CD28032DD963B26:r "Will you stand with President Trump and help me fight the radical

This is just a small list of what Nancy Pelosi has sent to the Senate for a final vote: Rigging our elections for the rest of our lives to maintain their grip on power, Trillions in a blue-state bailout to all of Joe Biden's friends, Defunding the police in your neighborhood, Redefining gender , Amnesty for millions of illegal immigrants A National Gun Registry , AND a new ban on "assault rifles" (whatever they decide that means). A Bill to grant statehood to the District of Columbia , giving the Democrats two new ULTRA-LIBERAL Senators and a permanent majority in the Senate "Will you stand with President Trump and help me fight the radical Left in the U.S. Senate? We can save America with your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or just $45 TODAY!" The Democrats aren't stupid (just corrupt) , and they know that if I have enough early support, they won't be able to stop me. They are mobilizing against me - we don't have any more time to waste. "I need to raise an additional $129,300 in the next 48 hours to make sure the Democrats know that they cannot win this fight for the nation's soul." Together, we must put an end to their unconstitutional laws and wannabe dictators like Joe Biden, who think they can override our inalienable rights, as granted by God and our Founding Fathers. President Trump has backed my campaign. Are you standing with us or with Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer? "You need to decide right now." For America, "Mo Brooks" Mo Brooks Conservative Candidate for Senate | | "STAND WITH TRUMP & MO" | PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE** Please take a minute to read the special message from our sponsor. subject: Pain at the Pump? Thanks, Biden
body:
Higher prices and the liberal agenda [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mhhjkld-yddjllujiu-r/) Patriot, The week before Election Day, the national average for a gallon of gas was just $2.20. A year ago, it was around $1.60 in Wisconsin.But this week, after months of Joe Biden in the White House and anti-energy liberals in Congress, it's all the way up to $3.05 a gallon... _and still rising. _That's nearly a **40% increase** - and if you've filled up your tank lately, you know it adds up. [Click here to stand with Glenn Grothman and fight for lower gas prices and pro-American energy reforms in Congress!](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mhhjkld-yddjllujiu-y/) [[JOIN GLENN] LOWER GAS PRICES NOW!](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mhhjkld-yddjllujiu-t/) Under President Trump, American energy independence was a priority and driving a gas-powered car was something you didn't have to apologize for.

But today, the far-left liberals in Congress have a much different vision. They don't mind American families getting gouged at the gas station because it fits with their radical agenda of "alternative" energy and the "Green New Deal!"

disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:

Friend, Earlier this week, Glenn Youngkin became the Republican nominee for Virginia Governor. And yesterday, Donald Trump endorsed him in an email to his millions of supporters, calling Glenn a "Patriot." **Friend, this is a crisis moment for Virginia 's future.** **_[I 'm asking you directly to rush a contribution to my campaign so we can have the resources to stop Donald Trump and Glen Youngkin. We can't let Trump's hand-picked candidate become the next Governor of Virginia.](https://act.myngp.com/el/oRIUsQjZteibuoizRtMry6kGkNvW-vwZyoWHN7PqT0c=/3Wgf6q4Kqh7jbumNLH67nGnHIXGdHXenBkK40xxCQk4=?refcode=20210506_RN_TRM)_** Trump's glowing endorsement isn't surprising to anyone paying attention -- Youngkin spent his entire primary campaign sucking up to Trump. Like Trump, he made voter suppression the focus of his campaign. I have news for Trump and Youngkin -- stopping people from voting isn't "patriotic," it's disgusting and anti-democratic. Friend, Glenn Youngkin already bought himself the Republican nomination for Governor. With Donald Trump and his extremist army behind him, the threat that Youngkin poses to Virginia's progress is unlike anything Virginia has seen in a generation. We fought too hard to defeat Donald Trump to let Glenn Youngkin bring Trumpism to Virginia through the back door. **_[Please, contribute anything you can to my campaign right now -- we can 't let Glenn Youngkin roll back our progress and bring Trumpism to Virginia.](https://act.myngp.com/el/oRIUsQjZteibuoizRtMry6kGkNvW-vwZyoWHN7PqT0c=/3Wgf6q4Kqh7jbumNLH67nGnHIXGdHXenBkK40xxCQk4=?refcode=20210506_RN_TRM)_** Game on, Terry

FIRE FAUCI NOW! BECOME A CITIZEN COSPONSOR

Peter -- Schools and churches shut down.
Businesses shuttered. Lives destroyed. America's economy on life
support.
Anthony Fauci did everything he could, along
with the Democrats, Big Tech and the Fake News Media to TANK
President Trump's booming economy.

Fauci misled the American people and we
Americans can no longer afford Fauci's Pandemic Reign of Terror.
Fauci is out of control and must be FIRED!

Fauci has been wrong at nearly every turn
about the China Virus. His actions have resulted in misery for
millions of Americans.
The bill I introduced today, the "Fire Fauci
Act," reduces his salary to $0 (he's the highest-paid federal
employee in the country -- more than POTUS) and increases

knew it, and how they responded.
Become a Citizen Cosponsor to DEFUND and FIRE
FAUCI!

-- Marjorie Taylor Greene

name: Bobby Scott
subject: I'm proud to endorse Jay Jones
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Jay Jones for Attorney General
body:
|
---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/G7YnpqZ_cvfm4YE9Tw7fdFAWY8DDrtAx71AMluZzBmI=/Uy0dkDrsaKLcmRLWt1fzM1RncfJboaaBHL2tp8Y-nDE=)
---
Friend -- I'm so proud to announce today that I'm endorsing Jay Jones for Attorney General of Virginia. Throughout his career, Jay has shown an unwavering commitment to the fight for justice reform, and I know he will continue that work to build a more equitable Commonwealth. When Jay is Attorney General, Virginians can count on him to be a proactive leader who works aggressively to bring accountability to policing, reform our judicial and sentencing system, and reorient the office to fight for justice for every Virginian. With Jay's leadership, I'm confident we can build on the progress we have made and rise to this moment in our country's history to be a national leader in building a justice system that works for all of our communities. **[Please join me in supporting Jay by making a contribution of $20 today!](https://act.myngp.com/el/G7YnpqZ_cvfm4YE9Tw7fdFAWY8DDrtAx71AMluZzBmI=/IfyjdDlC4cHoeEix0lrHKAHiJmLKWnfBKcB-cFrKUvI=)** \- Congressman Bobby Scott

I didn’t know that I would make history as one of the first women to serve the entirety of her career on combatant ships, or that I would eventually command a combat-ready unit of 400+ sailors -- I just knew that I wanted to give back, to be a part of something bigger than myself. But that’s exactly how change happens. Everyday people, like you and me, who make the choice to take action and do what they can to make the world a better place. I ran for Congress as a first-time candidate in 2018 for the same reason I joined the Navy -- to give back and help build a safer, stronger, and fairer society for this generation and the next. **Our real work is just beginning. But I can’t do it alone --[so friend, I’m asking you today to stand with me on behalf of Coastal Virginians and hard-working Americans across the country >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29055130/285176449/646481153?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTRjZTNkZS0zN2IzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9Gq-DSF43mvFNS2jSUG79F8BznNsRPkyVLeR_4ygxE=&emci=18a3518a-24ac-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=ae4ce3de-37b3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=7932963)** | | | [Stand with Elaine >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29055131/285176450/646481153?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTRjZTNkZS0zN2IzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9Gq-DSF43mvFNS2jSUG79F8BznNsRPkyVLeR_4ygxE=&emci=18a3518a-24ac-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=ae4ce3de-37b3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=7932963)

I’m not a career politician -- I’m a veteran and former small business owner who wants to be able to look my daughter in the eye and say that I stepped forward when my country needed me.
But I didn’t get to Congress by myself. Our team defied the odds and flipped VA-02 in 2018 because of supporters like you who refused to back down -- and that’s how we went toe-to-toe with the full force of the GOP establishment and millions in dark money to hold this seat in 2020.
It was all of us, deciding that we wanted to fight for the honest, accountable representation we deserved and putting everything we had into making it happen.
**But this is one of the most competitive seats in the nation, and I’m truly relying on everyday people like you to help me defend it --[will you join our team in the fight to protect our healthcare, tackle the climate crisis, and get our economy up and running again?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29055134/285176451/646481153?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTRjZTNkZS0zN2IzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9Gq-DSF43mvFNS2jSUG79F8BznNsRPkyVLeR_4ygxE=&emci=18a3518a-24ac-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=ae4ce3de-37b3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=7932963)**

| | Derek,

Glenn Youngkin has had a big two days. First, he bought the Republican gubernatorial nomination by spending millions of his own money. Then Donald Trump endorsed him -- an endorsement an elated Glenn said he was “proud” to get.

While Glenn was out doing his victory lap yesterday, Virginia election guru Larry Sabato dropped a bombshell.

**Youngkin told Republican insiders that he plans to spend up to $75 million of his personal fortune to become Virginia’s Governor.**

Think about that -- that’s $75 million to buy this race even before his rainmakers Donald Trump and Ted Cruz tap their mega-rich donor networks to help him.

If Virginia Democrats have any shot of winning the Governor’s office this November, that starts with building a strong grassroots team of small dollar donors who can match their big money machine.

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: My father was a lineman
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29056545/285178642/-272948131?refcode=210512-PRO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTUyZTQxZi0zYWIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZrBHH8l3Bm3I8v6rCb8vi7s46f1pnzKmkc4I7K18lcY=&emci=2995e0a2-77b2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=6e52e41f-3ab3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=252045)
---
Friends — when unions are strong, workers are strong. And when workers are strong, our economy and our country are strong. For too long, too many big corporations have refused to give their workers the salaries, benefits, and collective bargaining power they deserve. Throughout the pandemic, 45 of the 50 biggest companies in America have continued to turn profits and pay their shareholders while laying off tens of thousands of employees. [**I’m proud to sponsor the** _PRO Act_**, which will expand the rights of workers to organize and impose penalties on employers who threaten their workers for doing so. Will you sign your name as a citizen co-sponsor of this important workers’ rights legislation?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29056549/285178643/243660848?refcode=210512-PRO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTUyZTQxZi0zYWIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZrBHH8l3Bm3I8v6rCb8vi7s46f1pnzKmkc4I7K18lcY=&emci=2995e0a2-77b2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=6e52e41f-3ab3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=252045) | [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29056553/285178647/243660848?refcode=210512-PRO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTUyZTQxZi0zYWIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZrBHH8l3Bm3I8v6rCb8vi7s46f1pnzKmkc4I7K18lcY=&emci=2995e0a2-77b2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=6e52e41f-3ab3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=252045)
---
My father was a lineman and a member of the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers. Thanks to the power of collective bargaining, he was able to receive an adequate salary and benefits to sustain our family.
But that’s not as often the case any more. Too many Americans are working two or three jobs to make ends meet, and too often they are underpaid, overworked, or even laid off with little to no notice. And in states across the country, right-to-work laws are continuing to embolden big corporations and chip away at workers’ rights.
[**The** _PRO Act_**could change all that. But we need to keep the pressure on to get this critical expansion of workers’ rights through the Senate and signed into law. Will you add your name to our petition in support of the** _PRO Act_**?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29056556/285178650/243660848?refcode=210512-PRO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTUyZTQxZi0zYWIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZrBHH8l3Bm3I8v6rCb8vi7s46f1pnzKmkc4I7K18lcY=&emci=2995e0a2-77b2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=6e52e41f-3ab3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=252045)

We are strongest when we speak together. Thanks for raising your voice.
— Martin

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: here’s what I’m not asking you to do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Friend,
Look, I am not going to promise you that all of our problems will magically go away if I’m elected.
You weren’t born yesterday, and you know yourself that any politician who makes that kind of claim is telling a bald-faced lie.
But I can promise you that if I am elected, I’ll work harder than anyone else for working people. Because I know in my bones what happens when government doesn’t work.
And I believe, from the bottom of my heart, that when we build big coalitions — when we build big movements — there’s nothing that we can’t do.
So I’m not asking you to join a cult of my personality. And I’m not asking you to elect me to be a mascot for PA.
**But I’m asking you to help me build this coalition — one that includes working folks from all across Pennsylvania and the country.**
[If you’re able, will you contribute to building a movement big enough to meet this moment? Any amount you donate helps us take big ideas like healthcare for everybody, debt-free college, and climate revolution to Washington.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29056983/285179494/-347207331?refcode2=3f1245a2-3ab3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&refcode=em210512-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjEyNDVhMi0zYWIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M5pqXwS8XW79LVVEvZQnPOaTEogqii7W4ZAyQjeWRY4=)

name: Team Franchot
subject: A frank email about online trolls
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter --
Social media has revolutionized our society for better and for worse. And for campaigns like ours, it’s completely changed how candidates can interact with members of the public.
Peter Franchot loves being able to use social media to talk to everyday Marylanders. But while we want him to continue to use platforms like Facebook to keep supporters in the loop on the exciting updates happening with our campaign, we also want to fight back about the misinformation social media is still being used to circulate.
Oftentimes, online trolls attempt to hijack the conversations we’re having with supporters, because they know that if Peter Franchot wins the Primary Election he is a virtual lock to win the General Election. Taking inspiration from the former occupant of the Oval Office, they comment with hateful and divisive rhetoric, and try to prevent substantive conversations from taking place.
Let us be clear. We welcome diversity of thought and opinion, and we strive to create an environment where a wide array of voices can be heard and respected. However, these online trolls don’t try to discuss the issues. Instead, they make social media a toxic environment for everyone, in the hope that they can cause enough headache to make everyday, hard working Marylanders disengage. But Marylanders won’t back down to hateful rhetoric, and neither will we.
In fact, we have a strategy to fight back. We plan to run more digital ads that enable us to get our message out and expand our audience to people who want to have substantive conversations about the future of our state, without letting the trolls derail the conversation. But in order to do this, we need your help!
Will you help us combat online trolls by chipping in for our digital ads? Your contribution will help get the message out to new voters, and promote the civil and constructive dialogue that Marylanders deserve to have about the future of our state. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/onlinetrolls?refcode=active&amount=20.22]
These online trolls are willing to spend day and night trying to prevent valuable discussions from taking place. They only want to distract, derail, and ultimately divide our movement. But thanks to you, we know they’re not going to succeed.
Thank you,
Team Franchot
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/onlinetrolls?refcode=active&amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/661cd281-35b3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8/893221ca-3bb3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTMyMjFjYS0zYmIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3XINGIl6FTaH2hnUWwUjp9RjROtNUifqq7rnnQY8O6o=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: Michelle Steel
subject: Have you had an unfair tax bill?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
Every aspect of life in the Golden State also seems to come with a tax bill...
****

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OIuy2msUf1Duqa4T5_OKXVptbaeudR291tVG_KSJlGep7sYyxeVjd7owGOmwP3sbwF7JdJ3BQ9NMqk-U_WPlw0NcnBdYqKP6_Myzwloh4xc_xXdbeAhW2KKXVnr2mko5I3IDupFR83OPdFlkFgG9vw9v6aMtfayO2y-l4tehzTle3xlCJTSzFyxzV7r_bZWAdnCVTFCDYKnLy1K03UUhfX_rKToDm_F-9adW1A4yzYo4lAPEuoKvJCzAEoXKnm2mCuCXloyWNmKH0tUoGVjzeguMPvh3IzzwQEIg8VzHOeQpFa_ff1szcdU7rU8RHi8nyeh8awI1czVgUECdcLCKfueJWTAE_Rla3sBAujk596yCT8roekYlTjKAlgRaXWbHXSCJUzKtUnzPWqy67iuL5Q==&c=Kp5hg_KFoTyNvhiUualh7szEd3PO0BRWz128S_WGR3lV0P3Pwp4xaQ==&ch=s6Gk-Az9PGqLT_mL1dJbmrZrJ4rA8WkoTqtK7KMjoUBk6cpfiwM83Q==)[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OIuy2msUf1Duqa4T5_OKXVptbaeudR291tVG_KSJlGep7sYyxeVjd7owGOmwP3sbwF7JdJ3BQ9NMqk-U_WPlw0NcnBdYqKP6_Myzwloh4xc_xXdbeAhW2KKXVnr2mko5I3IDupFR83OPdFlkFgG9vw9v6aMtfayO2y-l4tehzTle3xlCJTSzFyxzV7r_bZWAdnCVTFCDYKnLy1K03UUhfX_rKToDm_F-9adW1A4yzYo4lAPEuoKvJCzAEoXKnm2mCuCXloyWNmKH0tUoGVjzeguMPvh3IzzwQEIg8VzHOeQpFa_ff1szcdU7rU8RHi8nyeh8awI1czVgUECdcLCKfueJWTAE_Rla3sBAujk596yCT8roekYlTjKAlgRaXWbHXSCJUzKtUnzPWqy67iuL5Q==&c=Kp5hg_KFoTyNvhiUualh7szEd3PO0BRWz128S_WGR3lV0P3Pwp4xaQ==&ch=s6Gk-Az9PGqLT_mL1dJbmrZrJ4rA8WkoTqtK7KMjoUBk6cpfiwM83Q==) **Californians pay some of the highest taxes in the country. Every aspect of life in the Golden State also seems to come with a tax bill ... **

-> Gas taxes
-> Sales taxes
-> Property taxes
-> State income taxes
-> Federal income taxes
-> Estate taxes
-> Capital gains taxes
-> Payroll taxes
-> Social security taxes

**On top of all that, the Biden Administration and Democrats in Congress actually want to increase taxes!**

I know families and businesses are hurting from these taxes, and I am determined to do something. I need to hear from you specifically, Friend, if we're going to do something about it. The radical left believes in one thing: _their radical, socialist agenda. _

Anything else comes secondary -- **and that includes the Constitution.**

[**Do you believe we should protect our constitutional rights from the radical liberals?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BkR_Prax5eQpjOlH6qfcd7w_7FdNgvLR83aIeI3pebvkmIEMpg14l-_mvumTHPOYghHiRvOAZPy9PQq9VKammL0ZRdW53QafQIHzFz5LdoVy3DeLKheg8-Vhak3-OcreAoyQLNg545uNyztjUKy-5mpSjA77J05Xwh_OY24FhvYLb8CPCXKnA4DsxiVOEbOmvuSTjP6W66J8hlXohs5rGDPFN07ZnSJ0xQwQYhzHFfYZqg0YO7JIth6vatgoB4ajur67jyc0Vd1DdsFXQU-4bTHQODl7fg_Dh6zOZWixJuSOYk-GFSLY95SGy_12IZ9US046dO455_Hd3aOAAFj17rMsS08BFje3l27_fD_EPlmSuB1sdDw6ImL2X5ftg58fmkpNfmhcsZS8LfkQ06sPSxA1l5U7Y4x8GCRscnOVJPE=&c=LgRijKDqspk74El5h3WO0EAG1yOmy2NBuzwqRLCDeH8ubrRGPgY_QA==&ch=6yFojR1-Q9JjApSfDnClb0TfUNRRtUw6_Ljqb4-SoloPZL6gFg57XQ==)

_They 've decided their agenda is more important than anything our country's Founders had to say._ And because of that, the left is about to TRAMPLE our rights.

body:
We need to stop big tech censorship for good!

| | |

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Not Sorry
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57365368:JPRKiQlNG:m:1:3206719985:87D5F3E52077BFACAD3A210709433715:r "Headline") Peter: It is rare for me to agree with CNN, but they are right: I am not sorry, and I will not apologize. **_I will not apologize_** for standing up for the integrity of our election system. **_I will not apologize_** for standing up to Big Tech companies that believe they, and they alone, can decide who is free to speak and who is not--if you, President Trump, or I should be canceled for our views. **_I will not apologize_** for questioning why Joe Biden thinks he can tell us when to leave our homes, go to work, go to church, or if we need to wear 1 or 2 masks. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57365368:JPRKiQlNG:m:1:3206719985:87D5F3E52077BFACAD3A210709433715:r "Democrats")The Democrats, and the media, are so out of touch with the American people that they cannot FATHOM why I will NEVER apologize for standing up to Joe Biden's tyranny. **[NO MORE. We must resist the elites of this nation who mock us at cocktail parties while stifling our rights as Americans. They must be stopped.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57365368:JPRKiQlNG:m:1:3206719985:87D5F3E52077BFACAD3A210709433715:r "NO MORE. We must resist the elites of this nation who mock us at
cocktail parties while stifling our rights as Americans. They must be stopped.")** I don't work for Joe Biden; _I work for the people of Missouri. So, when Chuck Schumer starts rushing to pass Biden 's radical agenda before this Memorial Day, you can be assured I will be fighting them with every fiber in me._
* _Trillions of dollars for liberal pet projects_
* _Defunding the police_
* _Amnesty for 11 million illegal aliens_
* _Abolishing gun rights_
* _DC Statehood_
* _Rigging our elections_

I'm not here to compromise on my principles, and that's why I refuse to play the game like the rest of the Swamp. I don't cow-tow to them, Big Tech, or the Establishment, which has made me a major target. **They are all afraid of me because they cannot shout me down. They cannot intimidate me.** They tried to cancel my book, but I found another publisher to share my clarion call about the threat our nation faces from a monopolistic Big Tech sector and other Big Corporations who pull the strings in our nation's capital. They are trying to threaten my seat in the Senate, but fortunately, great patriots like you are writing and donating regularly, and hundreds of voters are showing up to every event to greet me when I go home. That kind of support lets me know I'm on the right track as I fight socialism on Capitol Hill. It's also the kind of support that is driving the left crazy. **[Will you please make your most generous contribution so I have what I need to keep going? Any amount, from $5 to the Federal Maximum of $2,900, is greatly appreciated.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57365368:JPRKiQlNG:m:1:3206719985:87D5F3E52077BFACAD3A210709433715:r "Will you please make your most
generous contribution so I have what I need to keep going? Any amount, from $5 to the Federal Maximum of $2,900, is greatly appreciated.")** They're going to come after me with everything they have. It's not a matter of "if," it's just a matter of "when," _and I need your help._ **[Are you with me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57365368:JPRKiQlNG:m:1:3206719985:87D5F3E52077BFACAD3A210709433715:r "Are you with me?")** For America,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57365369:JPRKiQlNG:m:1:3206719985:87D5F3E52077BFACAD3A210709433715:r "Josh Hawley")
Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri | | [STAND WITH JOSH](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57365368:JPRKiQlNG:m:1:3206719985:87D5F3E52077BFACAD3A210709433715:r "STAND WITH
JOSH")

body:
After a successful Kansas GOP convention, the Kansas Republican Party has never been stronger. We have a real chance to elect someone who supports con After a successful Kansas GOP convention, the Kansas Republican Party has never been stronger. We have a real chance to elect someone who supports conservative values, and that’s why I’m happy to give my full support to Derek Schmidt for the Republican nomination for Governor. clean_body: Don’t believe what you see on the news, Peter... | | | Peter, Today, North Carolina Republican Virginia Foxx formally motioned to remove Liz Cheney from her leadership role in Congress. The vote was swift, it was decisive, and it showed how united our Republican Party is behind the America First Agenda ahead of the 2022 Midterm Elections. The Fake News Media wants to sell you a story about a “GOP Civil War,” but nothing could be further from the truth. Grassroots Republicans and Congressional Leadership have never been more united, and we’re poised for a MAJOR VICTORY in 2022. | | | | | | | | | The fact is that it’s House Democrats who are on the run -- not Republicans. All over the nation, Democrats are abandoning their re-election campaigns because they know they’re going to get absolutely thumped by America First Republicans. Joe Biden’s “agenda” has been a DISASTER, and the Left knows it. | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

name: Christy Smith
subject: My mom was a nurse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29067342/285216841/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTBiMDZmMC01NGIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WUvDdqhOOs31w1LWohOV64GZGNIxscocRueD_Gh0E8M=&emci=d00b06f0-54b3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=d10b06f0-54b3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=11385749)

Peter --

My mom, Gail Fisher, was a nurse for much of her life. She was the most caring person I’ve ever met -- not just to me and my family, but to so many patients.

She was on the front lines of the beginnings of the AIDS epidemic. She was a tireless advocate for the people in her care -- and she taught me that dedicating yourself to serving others is the _best_ way to leave a mark on this world. She’s a big reason why I’ve spent so much of my life as an advocate for our community.

**Now, after going above and beyond to save lives during a once-in-a-century pandemic, nurses and health care workers have more than earned our support. Our real, material, committed support, not just applause and cards.

[It’s International Nurses Day, and instead of a “thank you,” I’m going to ask you to donate $5 -- or any amount that works for you -- to the American Nurses Foundation Coronavirus Response Fund for Nurses. They advocate for national policies that support nurses and patients, promote access to mental health resources for nurses, and provide direct assistance to nurses who are struggling.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29067344/285216843/-236539899?refcode=em21_210512_nurses-s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTBiMDZmMC01NGIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WUvDdqhOOs31w1LWohOV64GZGNIxscocRueD_Gh0E8M=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29067346/285216847/-236539899?refcode=em21_210512_nurses-s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTBiMDZmMC01NGIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WUvDdqhOOs31w1LWohOV64GZGNIxscocRueD_Gh0E8M=) I’ve met, talked to, and rallied with lots of nurses before and during this horrible pandemic. I’m going to fight for all of them, and I’m doing it in memory of the nurse who raised me. The nurse who taught me to trust science and love people and not be scared of a little needle.

The nurses who brought us through this crisis -- who risked their lives to save others -- deserve our gratitude now. They deserve resources to care for their mental health. They deserve policies that guarantee them access to child care and a living wage. _They need our help._

**[Can you donate any amount directly to the Coronavirus Response Fund for Nurses to show our frontline heroes that we’re with them?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29067348/285216849/-236539899?refcode=em21_210512_nurses-s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTBiMDZmMC01NGIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WUvDdqhOOs31w1LWohOV64GZGNIxscocRueD_Gh0E8M=)**

Thank you so much for supporting nurses today and every day. This is deeply personal -- and so important.

Thanks,

Christy
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29067349/285216851/-236539899?refcode=em21_210512_nurses-s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTBiMDZmMC01NGIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WUvDdqhOOs31w1LWohOV64GZGNIxscocRueD_Gh0E8M=)

body:
He’s Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate.f
| | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29067607/285217859/-2023814932?refcode=20210512_TE_5GT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzVkZGNjNi01NWIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ct6il0bZzK2uGvLSvIs1ZRg4JbPfISKP4IMpwQuze-0=)

| | Derek,

GOP extremist Glenn Youngkin bought himself the Republican nomination for Governor of Virginia, and mere _hours_ later, Donald Trump gave him a full-throated endorsement.

So how happy was Glenn to have Trump’s support? Last night, Youngkin showed up on the local news to say he was “proud” to have the twice-impeached former President’s endorsement.

Derek, Terry’s been saying it for months -- the 2021 Governor’s race is about stopping Trumpism and keeping Virginia moving forward.

If we’re going to stop Glenn Trumpkin from becoming Governor, Virginia Democrats need to come together right now.

**[Will you pitch in $15 to help us take on Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29067608/285217860/-2023814932?refcode=20210512_TE_5GT&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzVkZGNjNi01NWIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ct6il0bZzK2uGvLSvIs1ZRg4JbPfISKP4IMpwQuze-0=)**

**Defeating Trump’s hand-picked candidate won’t be easy, Derek. He’s promised to spend up to $75 million of his own fortune to try to buy the Governor’s office, and he’ll have unlimited resources to run false and misleading attack ads against Terry.**

That’s why your support (today!) is so important.

We’re running from behind, and the only way to catch up is to build up a grassroots army of supporters who are ready to stop the return of Trumpism to Virginia.

**[Will you pitch in just $15 right now to join our grassroots team and fight back against Youngkin?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29067609/285217861/-2023814932?refcode=20210512_TE_5GT&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzVkZGNjNi01NWIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ct6il0bZzK2uGvLSvIs1ZRg4JbPfISKP4IMpwQuze-0=)**

We need 5,000 donations by the end of the week to stand a chance against Trump’s hand-picked candidate, Derek.

subject: Four Months In…
body:
What do you think about Biden’s leadership?
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dNIIuG_FlSCJigILykPwa20l1Y0emajIhBqAVWqKrWFL02-eZf__VL2dFwkyv5o-ONUMRpjn2x682ybZcOKQ9e76hREXCaWYNuht4pEbNhFtlo8nDe-g3aOL8tckCNH3Eglcgia4BoAanGxWPRxvDr4ToS99G5i4-iIYIHie2Kvkd_HsS6y5FPpwY5yOygri&c=DSQ9U263Iw-w2TcJQTAxk56UGdZ4ppb2A15tEjO4Re1TVbZX7IKXZg==&ch=CWBxifmRaJaSwKajcKOn_skgaXQ_haf9VJlx-PzWlPVAu3UAcUFcXw==&jrc=1)
---
| Patriot,
The Biden Administration has been a disaster since they came into office. They have swiftly opened our borders, rejoined globalist organizations, spent trillions, sowed discontent, and proposed absurd legislation to Congress.

body:
I'm a candidate for health, not waste | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ec7b50b99e1e/hello-4912738?e=9a7df6c10f)

### Let's Heal Washington!
**Hello Peter, ,**
| | | | | | **I'm Brent Hennrich, and I am reaching out to you to humbly ask for your support in my bid to serve as the Washington US Representative for the 3rd Congressional District.****I believe that healthcare reform will benefit everyone and heal Washington.****Too many American families have had the traumatic experience of large medical debts incurred after a tragic event, my family is among them.**
---
| [](https://BH4C.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=27739a80cfdaa3b90571b5a42&id=5f6297dc18&e=9a7df6c10f)
---
**I am running because our current healthcare “non-system,” has convinced me that we must stand up to do better for our people - all of our people.****I ask you to join me in making access to good healthcare a universal right in our country. Together we can**[**#FlipWA03**](https://BH4C.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=27739a80cfdaa3b90571b5a42&id=44c9fd0aaa&e=9a7df6c10f)**You can learn more about me by visiting **[**BH4C.com**](https://BH4C.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=27739a80cfdaa3b90571b5a42&id=5141bdfc89&e=9a7df6c10f)

name: Gabrielle Quintana Greenfield
subject: making sure to connect with Peter​
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
body:
| | |

I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself to Jennifer’s strongest supporters. My name is Gabrielle Quintana Greenfield and I’m a Senior Advisor on Jennifer’s team.

We are the underdog in this race between the status quo (Terry McAuliffe) and the future (Jennifer). Democratic voters will have the opportunity to decide if we want to continue as we were or create the next chapter in Democratic leadership in Virginia.

**_Bottom line: I’m supporting Jennifer because she’s the next chapter in Democratic leadership and polling shows she’s the candidate Virginians want to vote for._

With the right resources, we will win the primary AND win in November. I’m confident of it. I know the team has told you about our plan to expand our media buy.

[We need the money in the door by the end of the day to wire it to the stations. Can you chip in? name: Erica Smith
subject: There are no Black women in the Senate. We’re going to change that.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We can’t make bold, transformational change in this country unless we change who holds the power.
#
**Here’s a cold, hard truth:** It’s 2021, and no Black women serve in the United States Senate. NONE!!!
**[So we’re going to change that. Will you chip in to our historic campaign for the U.S. Senate today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210512-1?refcode=em20210512-80&t=1&refcode2=80_3698_fYpN38&akid=80%2E3698%2EfYpN38)**
**Representation matters.** Right now, Black and brown communities are facing the brunt of persistent injustices; we can’t make bold, transformational change in this country until we change who holds the power.
I’m running for the United States Senate to do just that. But if I’m going to win, I need your support. So I’m asking you:
[**_Will you chip in $10 (or whatever you can afford) to help us get one step closer to flipping a Republican-held, open seat and bring real change to Washington?_**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210512-1?refcode=em20210512-80&t=21&refcode2=80_3698_fYpN38&akid=80%2E3698%2EfYpN38)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210512-1?refcode=em20210512-80&t=22&refcode2=80_3698_fYpN38&akid=80%2E3698%2EfYpN38)**
As a Black woman raised in rural North Carolina, I’ve witnessed first-hand all the ways our system fails us — that’s why I’ve spent my life fighting for working people as a teacher, a minister, and a state senator.
**But the reality is that Black women face incredible obstacles when running for political office. We’re often overlooked and outraised because the pundits and the party establishment count us out.**
**[I need your support to prove them wrong. The stronger we can build our movement, the more we can prove we have what it takes to win. Chip in $10, or whatever you can, to help us build a massive, unapologetic movement for working people that will win this race.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210512-1?refcode=em20210512-80&t=23&refcode2=80_3698_fYpN38&akid=80%2E3698%2EfYpN38)**
Thank you so much for your support.
For ALL of us,
Erica

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210512-80-footer&t=24&refcode2=80_3698_fYpN38&akid=80%2E3698%2EfYpN38)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=25&akid=80%2E3698%2EfYpN38)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=80%2E3698%2EfYpN38)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

I’m running for the United States Senate to do just that. But if I’m going to win, I need your support. So I’m asking you: As a Black woman raised in rural North Carolina, I’ve witnessed first-hand all the ways our system fails us — that’s why I’ve spent my life fighting for working people as a teacher, a minister, and a state senator. name: John Burke
subject: The biggest middle-class tax cut in CA history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2021
body:
If we want to fix our economy, we have to fix our broken tax system. Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/de4aa9f2a285daf4/1e008b5701bb77a5c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Peter, Kevin just released his commonsense tax plan for California to fix our broken economy, and it includes a tax cut for every single Californian. _It also happens to be the largest middle-class tax cut in Golden State history. _ It’s no secret that taxes and a high cost of living are a big problem in California. We pay over 155 different taxes, and the highest state income tax rate in the nation! No wonder people and businesses are leaving California in droves — no one can afford to live here. **But Kevin has real world experience in keeping taxes low, and he has a plan to make California affordable for the middle class once again.** **[You can read more details about our newly released Tax Plan by CLICKING HERE.>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/de4aa9f2a285daf4/ec12a3f67951d35ac3d6b838967d376c/34943)** Some key proponents include: • Providing immediate tax relief by making the first $50,000 earned by individuals and $100,000 earned by families, free of state income taxes.
• Exempting Military Retirement Pay from State Income Tax.
• Changing current spending trends from out-of-control to reasonable levels.
• Implementing long-term spending reforms.
• Reforming broken bureaucracies like the Employment Development Department (EDD).
• And more! When fully implemented, Kevin’s plan will save families nearly $4,000 per year, and individuals nearly $2,000 per year. Not only will it be the largest middle-class tax cut in state history, but many earning lower incomes will see their total income taxes paid reduced to $0. **Kevin is ready to bring the California Comeback, and make our state the best place in the nation once again to work, live, and play!** For a better tomorrow,
John Burke, Communications Director | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/de4aa9f2a285daf4/94f68cccbf126d1ac3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/de4aa9f2a285daf4/a7c19108c9559089c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/de4aa9f2a285daf4/59f3c22e9eef6eb1c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/de4aa9f2a285daf4/0ba02f427e682648c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Would you ever run for local office? Fill out this form…
body:
| |
---
As part of our effort to keep our republic, [we would like to know](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTMyLTcxMTY1ZGViZWY3NjQ2MjJhMTNiMmI1ODQ0NWQ0Mjdl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvbG9jYWwtb2ZmaWNlLWNhbmRpZGF0ZS1zdXJ2ZXk_bWlkPTQzNzcxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=Xst-574hv1ybNpAf0uubNA) who among our supporters might be interested in running for local office, and if so, in which election cycle you would want to run. **We want to help with training for those that are interested.**

Local offices include everything from the state legislature to library boards and school boards, to city councils, health boards, and county commissions, etc. (whatever they may be called in your area) – anything state or local.

**Why should you run for local office?**
If you’ve never thought about running for local office, and wonder why you should consider it, think about this: who has had the most power over your daily life since Covid hit?

Answer: Health boards, school boards, city councils, etc. In many cases, they’re the ones who advised lockdowns, forced businesses to close, forced children to stay home or wear masks at school, and so on.

Another question. Who is in charge of content in the children’s section at the library? **Answer: The library board.**

Right now, with Washington, D.C. in the hands of the radical left, it is more important than ever to make sure our local and state governments are in the hands of people who love the Constitution and liberty, and will courageously stand up to defend it.

There is also the fact that there are elites from both parties who want nothing more than to erase the various levels of protection and elected positions between the federal government and the individual. They don’t want local police departments, local school boards, local election boards, etc., because that makes it awfully hard to exert total control.

Therefore, running for local office has become a critical tool in the freedom-loving American’s toolbelt, and we need to use it.

**So, please consider it, pray about it, let us know if you have any questions as you think on it, and[please fill out this form](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTMyLTcxMTY1ZGViZWY3NjQ2MjJhMTNiMmI1ODQ0NWQ0Mjdl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvbG9jYWwtb2ZmaWNlLWNhbmRpZGF0ZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP21pZD00Mzc3MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=gp51X_Rt9Yfz5ALZ9sanZg) to let us know.**

[COMPLETE MY SURVEY](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTMyLTcxMTY1ZGViZWY3NjQ2MjJhMTNiMmI1ODQ0NWQ0Mjdl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvbG9jYWwtb2ZmaWNlLWNhbmRpZGF0ZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP21pZD00Mzc3MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=p-XZW3ezRcS2mfIofd8sMQ)
In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTMyLTcxMTY1ZGViZWY3NjQ2MjJhMTNiMmI1ODQ0NWQ0Mjdl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvP21pZD00Mzc3MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=zCJZ1pDoK6Majx-UcrUHVg)

Right now, with Washington, D.C. in the hands of the radical left, it is more important than ever to make sure our local and state governments are in the hands of people who love the Constitution and liberty, and will courageously stand up to defend it. There is also the fact that there are elites from both parties who want nothing more than to erase the various levels of protection and elected positions between the federal government and the individual. They don’t want local police departments, local school boards, local election boards, etc., because that makes it awfully hard to exert total control. Therefore, running for local office has become a critical tool in the freedom-loving American’s toolbelt, and we need to use it. So, please consider it, pray about it, let us know if you have any questions as you think on it, and to let us know. In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. body:

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Mark needs our help today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
**FIRST:** National Republicans have made it clear that defeating us in 2022 is a top priority.
**THEN:** A major National Republican and Trump donor announced he is running against Mark. He spent $337,896 on TV ads 18 months before the election.
**NOW:** The National Republican Senatorial Committee stepped in and launched tens of thousands of dollars in ads of their own, a sign that Arizona is one of the most important battlegrounds in the 2022 midterm elections.
Here’s the deal: We know this is a signal that more attack ads are coming. So we’re working around the clock to prepare for whatever they throw at us next. Because if we’re in this together, we’re going to have Mark’s back and hold this seat.
[**So if you are able, will you make a $3 contribution to our people-powered campaign? We’ll put your contribution right to work in our efforts to defend Mark and hold this seat in 2022.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210512-1-15&t=1&refcode2=588_6688874_xdoP2h&akid=588%2E6688874%2ExdoP2h)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

We have a chance to hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate for a full six-year term if lots and lots of people chip in what they can when they can.
Your support will help us fight back against the attacks, set the record straight, and continue to run a campaign that is focused on improving people’s lives.
Thank you for having Mark’s back.
Team Kelly

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dan=20Crenshaw?=
subject: Back in the fight
body:
| |
---
| | | [ ](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=da8aafb8bc&e=56fbdb3cc4)
---
| | | Dear Fellow Patriot -

When an IED nearly blinded me in Afghanistan, I never felt self-pity. I raised my right hand and asked to be sent to war to fight America’s enemies. I knew the risks that came with taking that oath and I welcomed them, **because I love our great country. **

As a Navy SEAL, we don’t wallow in fear or sorrow when things get tough. We don’t know how to. **It’s not in our DNA.** We stiffen our spines and overcome whatever challenges life throws at us.

That’s exactly the same mentality I’ve used to tackle the terrifying diagnosis I received more than a month ago - that my retina was detaching, threatening permanent vision loss in the only eye I have left.

Now, thanks to incredible doctors and nurses at the VA in Houston and the tremendous outpouring of prayers and support from across the country, I’m on my road to recovery.

And soon, **I’m going to be back in the fight... standing up against the socialists in Washington trying to change our country for the worse. **

I know that Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden are advancing their radical agenda through Congress at break-neck pace. Federal takeovers of our elections. Criminalizing the Second Amendment. Raising your taxes. Packing the court. Abolishing the filibuster. Defunding the police. **Radically remaking America to fit their socialist vision. **

We need to fight back. **And I’m ready to get back in this fight. **

**I’ve never given up before and I’m not about to start now. I’ve continued to serve the people of my district and never stopped working, even during my recovery.**

But I need your help. I’m preparing a messaging blitz to take on the radical left and expose the truth to the American people about what the socialist agenda means for their lives. But I need resources to fund my efforts, which will include well-produced videos, advertisements, and more.

[**Chip in whatever you can. Any amount helps.**](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=f531cd82b9&e=56fbdb3cc4)
---
| [Contribute Now](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=b698bf03fa&e=56fbdb3cc4 "Contribute Now")
---
| **Not even potential blindness can take me out of the fight.** And I can’t wait to continue the fight alongside patriots like you as soon as possible.

Can I count on your support?

In Service,

Dan Crenshaw
---
| | |
---
|
---
|
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=8d0eb33ba1&e=56fbdb3cc4&c=07537325b7) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=8d0eb33ba1&e=56fbdb3cc4&c=07537325b7).

---

name: Tom Nelson
subject: I will fight tooth and nail to get elected to the U.S. Senate and make Medicare for All the law of the land.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | Friend,

I was excited to finally get out of the house this past weekend, feeling safe enough to campaign in person for the first time. I went to an SEIU rally to support our brave nurses in Madison and then participated in other events in Milwaukee to fight for a morally just state legislative budget and to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. But one encounter on the campaign trail stayed with me that I want to share. You may have heard this already, but I want to make sure all of my supporters know why I’m so invested in this race.

While I was campaigning in Milwaukee, I met Tim (I won't use his real name here). Tim was the product of our sub-par health insurance system. According to Tim, his employers rarely covered all of his mental health medicines. Consequently, it was hard for him to get along with co-workers and bosses and never lasted long at any one job. Different employers meant different prescription drug plans. Some plans covered his medicines, some did not. He went without one drug for seven years. He was visibly nervous and shy, and reluctant to contribute to conversations.

Afterward, he grabbed me like a messenger out of breath and shared his story. His story was compelling and made you ask the question: **how could this happen in the world's richest country?**

Tim took part of his Saturday afternoon off and was away from family just so he could meet with me to talk about Medicare for All. He was exhausted from being turned away or treated dismissively by other politicians. _A meeting with an under-dog US Senate candidate seemed his only option._

**After our meeting, I told my staffer, Tim was one more reason that I would fight tooth and nail to get elected to the U.S. Senate and make Medicare for All the law of the land.**

[Ensuring everyone has healthcare is a personal issue for me. If you feel the same way that Medicare for All should be the law of the land, can you support our campaign to unseat Ron Johnson? Any amount would be greatly appreciated.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29071485/285233607/-1023244246?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210512_1_2&refcode2=ddf0e4b8-62b3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGYwZTRiOC02MmIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UfsO4KiErqzJ87oeZ_p1PjVyfFj_uyjtp8OZZboR2hk=) | | **[CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29071486/285233609/-1023244246?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210512_1_2&refcode2=ddf0e4b8-62b3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGYwZTRiOC02MmIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UfsO4KiErqzJ87oeZ_p1PjVyfFj_uyjtp8OZZboR2hk=)**
---
I don’t have millions of dollars to my name, and I don’t have family money to pour into this campaign. I prefer it that way because I can fully empathize with folks like Tim and their day-to-day struggles.

I look forward to continuing to run a race where we fight for all the Tims out there.

Thank you for your continued support,

Tom Nelson

|

clean_body: | | Friend, I was excited to finally get out of the house this past weekend, feeling safe enough to campaign in person for the first time. I went to an SEIU rally to support our brave nurses in Madison and then participated in other events in Milwaukee to fight for a morally just state legislative budget and to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. But one encounter on the campaign trail stayed with me that I want to share. You may have heard this already, but I want to make sure all of my supporters know why I’m so invested in this race. While I was campaigning in Milwaukee, I met Tim (I won't use his real name here). Tim was the product of our sub-par health insurance system. According to Tim, his employers rarely covered all of his mental health medicines. Consequently, it was hard for him to get along with co-workers and bosses and never lasted long at any one job. Different employers meant different prescription drug plans. Some plans covered his medicines, some did not. He went without one drug for seven years. He was visibly nervous and shy, and reluctant to contribute to conversations. Afterward, he grabbed me like a messenger out of breath and shared his story. His story was compelling and made you ask the question: how could this happen in the world's richest country? Tim took part of his Saturday afternoon off and was away from family just so he could meet with me to talk about Medicare for All. He was exhausted from being turned away or treated dismissively by other politicians. A meeting with an under-dog US Senate candidate seemed his only option. After our meeting, I told my staffer, Tim was one more reason that I would fight tooth and nail to get elected to the U.S. Senate and make Medicare for All the law of the land. = | | = I don’t have millions of dollars to my name, and I don’t have family money to pour into this campaign. I prefer it that way because I can fully empathize with folks like Tim and their day-to-day struggles. I look forward to continuing to run a race where we fight for all the Tims out there. Thank you for your continued support, Tom Nelson | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. If you’d like to unsubscribe, = Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin Nelson for Wisconsin PO Box 361 Kaukauna, WI 54130 United States**

**_I’ve got a major update for you about H.R. 1_** — the Democrats’ bill that would put Washington liberals in charge of our elections, BAN voter ID, MANDATE ballot harvesting, and send your tax dollars to political campaigns you don’t support.

THIS WEEK, Democrats are taking the next step in the process to get H.R. 1 to Joe Biden’s desk. **They will do whatever it takes to pass this bill — because it will give them TOTAL power. **

This is a critical moment, We MUST expose H.R. 1 for what it is — a liberal power grab that would make our elections less secure and rig the game for the Democrats.

**I’m fighting this disaster tooth and nail in the U.S. Senate — and I will NEVER back down — but I cannot do this alone. **[Will you SIGN your name to the list of Patriots who are standing with Senate Republicans against H.R. 1?](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=ea5827e51a&e=0b94e583bc)

| | Peter, While two of the more "famous" opponents of mine in the race will drop traditional F-bombs to demonstrate their ferocity in supporting issues, they curiously avoid a mentioning the F-bomb that is causing real harm to our families: **_Fracking_.** Well, I am not afraid to say it, Peter: **Fracking was wrong to do yesterday, is wrong today, and will be wrong tomorrow.** Maybe my opponents won't come out and say it because they don't want to get sideways of the Big Energy special interests or any special interests, or maybe they don't understand the science, or maybe they just don't care as much about your health as their own media mentions. **[Join me as we take a stand against the special interests in this fight for a better future. Donate today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29074870/285244733/-34735242?refcode=2021-05-12-f-bomb&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ce2da1d0-6db3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTJkYTFkMC02ZGIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SZqp_FVMJIKUFMUPvcbdWSpYUCTaIuJl5qfPLJuSuVY=)** **Despite what oil and mining lobbyists tell their pet politicians on the golf course, fracking isn't about getting access to cheap fuel and jobs. It's downright destructive.** Fracking pollutes the air and water with dangerous chemicals. It puts communities at risk by disturbing the ground and inducing earthquakes. And it slows our badly-necessary transition to cleaner, greener energy sources, in the fight against climate change. Plus, fracking is an economic disaster. A study released in February by the Ohio River Valley Commission shows that the area's national share of personal income, jobs, and population all declined during a period of full fracking capacity. **Further, 90 percent of the wealth "created" by fracking left those local communities.** For me it is clear, it's time to take a stand, look the special interests in the eyes, and say enough's enough. Our future means we all have to do things differently in order to protect ourselves and our future. **[I am running for the U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania because our politicians don't get it or they care more about their status than they do about our future. clean_body: Offense intended. | | | Peter, While two of the more "famous" opponents of mine in the race will drop traditional F-bombs to demonstrate their ferocity in supporting issues, they curiously avoid a mentioning the F-bomb that is causing real harm to our families: Fracking. Well, I am not afraid to say it, Peter: Fracking was wrong to do yesterday, is wrong today, and will be wrong tomorrow. Maybe my opponents won't come out and say it because they don't want to get sideways of the Big Energy special interests or any special interests, or maybe they don't understand the science, or maybe they just don't care as much about your health as their own media mentions. = Despite what oil and mining lobbyists tell their pet politicians on the golf course, fracking isn't about getting access to cheap fuel and jobs. It's downright destructive. Fracking pollutes the air and water with dangerous chemicals. It puts communities at risk by disturbing the ground and inducing earthquakes. And it slows our badly-necessary transition to cleaner, greener energy sources, in the fight against climate change. Plus, fracking is an economic disaster. A study released in February by the Ohio River Valley Commission shows that the area's national share of personal income, jobs, and population all declined during a period of full fracking capacity. Further, 90 percent of the wealth "created" by fracking left those local communities. For me it is clear, it's time to take a stand, look the special interests in the eyes, and say enough's enough. Our future means we all have to do things differently in order to protect ourselves and our future. = Let's do something about it. name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Commit to speaking out against anti-AAPI rhetoric and violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

This Asian American and Pacific Islander (AAPI) Heritage Month, I am challenging those of us who are not members of the AAPI community to reckon with our state and our country's history of anti-AAPI legislation and commit to stopping the rise of anti-AAPI violence.

AAPI racism didn't start with the COVID-19 pandemic. From racist so-called "Alien Land Laws" which prohibited land ownership, to the internment of Japanese Americans during World War II, **Washington state has a history of anti-AAPI policies and hatred that we need to remedy.**

Hate has no home in Washington state or anywhere else in this country, and it's on all of us to denounce hate and discrimination against members of the AAPI community. I was proud to co-sponsor Rep. Grace Meng's resolution to condemn the rise in anti-Asian sentiment, as well as her COVID-19 Hate Crimes Act to do more to prevent and conduct oversight of hate crimes related to COVID-19.

**[This AAPI Heritage Month, will you join me in committing to speaking out against anti-AAPI violence? Together we can build a democracy that is equitable and just for all.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Js6M90v4P99Dv2vJq27jaFhLNq_D68B9SmgYFvOPHa8=/RDTXvrqnU42oiLZ7aqm2CcQyj_AJMG40A6hLqHEh3TI=?gpsid=50_115_18829&ms=em21_210512_AAPI_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&refcode=em21_210512_AAPI_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210512_AAPI_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Js6M90v4P99Dv2vJq27jaFhLNq_D68B9SmgYFvOPHa8=/RDTXvrqnU42oiLZ7aqm2CcQyj_AJMG40A6hLqHEh3TI=?gpsid=50_115_18829&ms=em21_210512_AAPI_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&refcode=em21_210512_AAPI_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210512_AAPI_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)
As the pandemic finally draws to a close, we cannot expect these hateful acts to just stop. We need to commit to standing up and fighting back against anti-AAPI hate every day.

**It 's going to take all of us to make a difference, so I hope you'll join in this fight. [Will you commit to speaking out against anti-AAPI rhetoric and violence? Add your name today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Js6M90v4P99Dv2vJq27jaFhLNq_D68B9SmgYFvOPHa8=/RDTXvrqnU42oiLZ7aqm2CcQyj_AJMG40A6hLqHEh3TI=?gpsid=50_115_18829&ms=em21_210512_AAPI_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&refcode=em21_210512_AAPI_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210512_AAPI_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek
