name: Laura Loomer
subject: Fighting Zuckerbucks
body:
I was shocked when I found out that Mark Zuckerberg and his wife gave my local elections office $6.8 million before the 2020 elections - about seven bucks for every registered voter in the county.
| | | | | Patriot,

[](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/77YkfpM00GGW6mDu8LwHWA/763EA433l5TPJzXzUVPimuhA) I was shocked when I found out that Mark Zuckerberg and his wife gave my local elections office $6.8 million before the 2020 elections - about seven bucks for every registered voter in the county.

That grant was 1.7% of the **$400 million donated by Zuck to fund "voting infrastructure" throughout the country**.

"Zuckerbucks" were sent to 2,471 counties in 49 states - **your voting office was likely funded by the founder of Facebook in 2020**.

Now, I live in Palm Beach County, the third wealthiest zip code in America according to Bloomberg and there is no shortage of funds. As a matter of fact, the county just passed a $5.4 billion budget!

**So why did Zuck throw millions at one of the wealthiest counties in nation and earmark his donation for voting infrastructure?**
**Why did Zuckerberg donate money to your county?

[Help me find out!](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/77YkfpM00GGW6mDu8LwHWA/763EA433l5TPJzXzUVPimuhA)**
Today, we're starting our investigation into Zuckerbucks around the nation, and will be filing Freedom of Information Requests to get to the bottom of this.

But I'm going to need your help to go through all of the documents that will be flowing in over the next month.

I'll be posting them online, but [**could you help cover staff costs of scanning and posting the documents?**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/77YkfpM00GGW6mDu8LwHWA/763EA433l5TPJzXzUVPimuhA)

We should be able to have FOIA fees from county governments waived, but I'm sure I'll probably have to pay for some of those as well.

We need to [**raise about $4,800 to get this started, so if you can chip in $25 or more**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/77YkfpM00GGW6mDu8LwHWA/763EA433l5TPJzXzUVPimuhA), I'd really appreciate it.

I'll report back soon, but please, help cover our initial costs [**by chipping in if you can**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/77YkfpM00GGW6mDu8LwHWA/763EA433l5TPJzXzUVPimuhA).

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---
(C) 2021 Illoominate Media
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://deploy.libersend.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/763EA433l5TPJzXzUVPimuhA)

name: Mike Espy
subject: Health care is a racial justice issue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Fairness Project
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29075738/285247264/797917113?refcode=espynatl_em0512&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWE2NzQ5ZC03MGIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lS3XkDywYxCtvp2-yDov6OjWBQohqXzQBWHG-Gy87Fk=) _The Fairness Projects runs and wins people-powered ballot initiatives to expand health care, raise wages, and make real change in red and blue states. If you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here](https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/98a6749d-70b3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8/99a6749d-70b3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWE2NzQ5ZC03MGIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lS3XkDywYxCtvp2-yDov6OjWBQohqXzQBWHG-Gy87Fk=&id=102101357)._ Hi friend, It’s long past time to address the racial disparities facing our country. One of the areas where we see striking inequalities is in health care. Black moms are three to four times more likely to die from childbirth. It’s a crisis we can’t ignore. **That’s why I am so proud that a new campaign in my home state of Mississippi is organizing to win a people-powered ballot initiative to expand Medicaid here -- a step that would mean major progress towards racial justice in health care.** _But it’s going to be a tough campaign. I know how hard it is to win and make progress here in Mississippi, and I know the special interests are ready to spend big against us._ **[Can you contribute today to Healthcare for Mississippi? Winning Medicaid expansion in Mississippi would be a major victory towards racial justice in my home state, and would mean so much to me and my fellow Mississippians.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29075739/285247265/797917113?refcode=espynatl_em0512&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWE2NzQ5ZC03MGIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lS3XkDywYxCtvp2-yDov6OjWBQohqXzQBWHG-Gy87Fk=) ** | **[Contribute →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29075740/285247266/797917113?refcode=espynatl_em0512&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWE2NzQ5ZC03MGIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lS3XkDywYxCtvp2-yDov6OjWBQohqXzQBWHG-Gy87Fk=)**
---
Over the past year, racial injustices and inequalities have become more apparent than ever.
And we saw record numbers of Americans -- Black and white, young and old -- take to the streets to demand change and to say that Black Lives Matter.
**Now, though, we have to follow through on that call. It’s time for action to make progress against racial inequality across our country.**
That’s what the Yes on 76: Healthcare for Mississippi campaign is all about. It’s a people-powered campaign organizing to win health care for hundreds of thousands of Mississippians, to cut through the partisan noise and make real change.
Plus, it would be a significant, tangible step towards reducing the racial health care disparities in our state.
**I know they can win -- but they’ll need your help to respond to the attacks and get it done.**
**[Please, make a contribution to Healthcare for Mississippi today to help win this groundbreaking campaign in my home state. It could be one of the most significant steps towards racial justice in Mississippi in a long time.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29075741/285247267/797917113?refcode=espynatl_em0512&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWE2NzQ5ZC03MGIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lS3XkDywYxCtvp2-yDov6OjWBQohqXzQBWHG-Gy87Fk=)**
**[Contribute →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29075742/285247268/797917113?refcode=espynatl_em0512&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWE2NzQ5ZC03MGIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lS3XkDywYxCtvp2-yDov6OjWBQohqXzQBWHG-Gy87Fk=)**
---
Together, I know we can win in Mississippi and show the nation that folks everywhere are ready for change, especially in red states.
Thanks,
Mike Espy
_ _
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29075743/285247269/1100783424?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWE2NzQ5ZC03MGIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lS3XkDywYxCtvp2-yDov6OjWBQohqXzQBWHG-Gy87Fk=&emci=98a6749d-70b3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=99a6749d-70b3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=561582) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29075744/285247270/-1451982884?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWE2NzQ5ZC03MGIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lS3XkDywYxCtvp2-yDov6OjWBQohqXzQBWHG-Gy87Fk=&emci=98a6749d-70b3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=99a6749d-70b3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=561582)

Your unwavering support helps us bring economic fairness to millions of Americans and put power directly in the hands of voters through ballot initiatives. The Fairness Project has won 20 ballot initiatives since 2016, changing the lives of nearly 18 million people by raising the minimum wage, expanding access to health care, capping payday lending, and winning paid leave. And we're just getting started. I know they can win -- but they’ll need your help to respond to the attacks and get it done. = = Together, I know we can win in Mississippi and show the nation that folks everywhere are ready for change, especially in red states. Thanks, Mike Espy _ Paid for by The Fairness Project. Thank you for supporting The Fairness Project. Your unwavering support helps us bring economic fairness to millions of Americans and put power directly in the hands of voters through ballot initiatives. The Fairness Project has won 20 ballot initiatives since 2016, changing the lives of nearly 18 million people by raising the minimum wage, expanding access to health care, capping payday lending, and winning paid leave. And we're just getting started. If you would like more ways to keep in touch and stay involved, please consider following us on and . Your partnership allows us to make all this possible. If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts, please =. Funds raised will be used to support ballot measures, on-the-ground efforts, and other advocacy activities in support of working families. It's completely ridiculous – but if we don't speak up and call this audit the sham that it is, then the GOP may succeed in casting doubt on President Biden's victory.**
That's why I need to hear from you so urgently. Please, we only have a few hours left before we close this petition, so speak out right now:

Friend, this may be the most outrageous attack on our democracy yet.
**Extremists in the Arizona GOP – led by Kelli Ward – are currently recounting millions of ballots in a sham "election audit" – all to overturn President Joe Biden's historic victory in Arizona!**
Even worse? They've hired a QAnon-supporting, conspiracy theorist group to conduct the recount _in secret_. Let's be clear: They're not trying to make our elections more secure. **They're still trying to push Trump's Big Lie, steal the election from President Biden and rig the system so Democrats can never win in Arizona again. And we need to fight back NOW. **

_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
In Congress, one of my top priorities is making sure American families have the child care they need.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29079590/285265497/267654163?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210512-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzhmMDNhNi04MWIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FtWVC1ivouiQ8yPriklCmPYDbkcL-j1aPmiCgwMHxAY=)
---
|

In Congress, one of my top priorities is making sure American families have the child care they need.

The lack of affordable, accessible child care was a problem before the pandemic -- but now it’s a full-blown crisis. In San Diego, more than 500 providers have had to close their doors, making a bad problem even worse.

The reality is that we’ll never be able to fully re-open our economy and recover from COVID-19 if we don’t have child care infrastructure in place to help parents to get back to work.

**That’s why I’m excited to partner with Senator Elizabeth Warren and Congressman Mondaire Jones to introduce the Universal Child Care and Early Learning Act, a bill that devotes $700 billion for universal child care, including major investments in child care facilities.**

This plan would be a game-changer for working parents, but it’s hard to ignore the political realities. Republicans are ready to take back the House majority in 2022, which would prevent our chances of getting a plan like this passed. Democrats can’t afford to lose a single seat next year. [_**Today, I’m asking you to contribute anything you can to protect this seat and the House majority.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29079591/285265498/267654163?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210512-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzhmMDNhNi04MWIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FtWVC1ivouiQ8yPriklCmPYDbkcL-j1aPmiCgwMHxAY=)

# Town hall at 6p tonight with Florida Governor Ron DeSantis
Tune in to Spicer & Co tonight at 6p on Newsmax for “Leading to Liberty” a special town hall with Florida Governor Ron DeSantis. We’re doing a sit down interview with Governor DeSantis, then will host a town hall covering the COVID economy, veterans issues, education and religious liberty where the governor will take questions from Floridians here in the Villages.

subject: Spike in Illegal Immigration Overwhelms Sheriffs; Families Exposed to Gang, Drug Violence
body:
Local law enforcement agencies nationwide are overwhelmed with criminal activity linked to a huge increase in illegal immigration and families are being exposed to violence associated with drug trafficking and transnational gangs, according to hundreds of sheriffs across the United States.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | May 12, 2021
---|---|---

---
# [Spike in Illegal Immigration Overwhelms Sheriffs; Families Exposed to Gang, Drug Violence](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53663&L=22890&F=H&)
Local law enforcement agencies nationwide are overwhelmed with criminal activity linked to a huge increase in illegal immigration and families are being exposed to violence associated with drug trafficking and transnational gangs, according to hundreds of sheriffs across the United States. In a letter to President Joe Biden, the law enforcement officials in more than two dozen states blast the administration’s “reckless and irresponsible” open border policies that are exposing innocent citizens to illegal alien violence. Titled, “Help America’s Sheriffs Keep Our Neighborhoods and Communities Safe by Halting Illegal Immigration,” the document asserts that the crisis began when Biden was vice president.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53663&L=22890&F=H&)
|
---
| |
---
### [Judicial Watch Sues for Records about Abuse of Children Tied to Biden Border Crisis ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53663&L=22861&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmlkZW4tYm9yZGVyLWNyaXNpcy1jaGlsZHJlbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUxMjIwNDk0Nw==) Judicial Watch Judicial Watch began investigating this matter in 2014 when a wave of UACs swamped the southwest border. Since that time, Judicial Watch has been investigating incidents of violence, drug trafficking, human trafficking, and other criminal activities, as well as whether migrant children were being abused while in U.S. shelters. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53663&L=22861&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmlkZW4tYm9yZGVyLWNyaXNpcy1jaGlsZHJlbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUxMjIwNDk0Nw==)
---
### [Big Tech Censorship & Government Collusion: Judicial Watch Reveals Secret History of 2020 Election ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53663&L=22841&F=H&) Judicial Watch Judicial Watch has uncovered critical new details in the secret history of the 2020 election: how state government officials—at times interfacing with the Biden presidential campaign—colluded with Twitter, Facebook, and YouTube to censor freedom of speech.

The new information raises enormous constitutional and legal questions. It challenges the conventional wisdom that the companies are operating solely as private actors and can remove or ban users of their services as they see fit, with no violation of First Amendment rights. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53663&L=22841&F=H&)
---
### [Judicial Watch Sues for Records of Pentagon Communications about Tucker Carlson and Fox News ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53663&L=22891&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY29tbXMtY2FybHNvbi1wZW50YWdvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUxMjIwNDk0Nw==) Judicial Watch “Judicial Watch is disturbed about the Pentagon’s illicit secrecy about its coordinated attacks on the First Amendment-protected speech of Tucker Carlson,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The fact that we must take the Pentagon to federal court for these documents suggests the agency has something to hide.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53663&L=22891&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY29tbXMtY2FybHNvbi1wZW50YWdvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUxMjIwNDk0Nw==)

clean_body: Local law enforcement agencies nationwide are overwhelmed with criminal activity linked to a huge increase in illegal immigration and families are being exposed to violence associated with drug trafficking and transnational gangs, according to hundreds of sheriffs across the United States. | | | Because no one is above the law! | May 12, 2021 ---|---|--- | | == == Local law enforcement agencies nationwide are overwhelmed with criminal activity linked to a huge increase in illegal immigration and families are being exposed to violence associated with drug trafficking and transnational gangs, according to hundreds of sheriffs across the United States. In a letter to President Joe Biden, the law enforcement officials in more than two dozen states blast the administration’s “reckless and irresponsible” open border policies that are exposing innocent citizens to illegal alien violence. Titled, “Help America’s Sheriffs Keep Our Neighborhoods and Communities Safe by Halting Illegal Immigration,” the document asserts that the crisis began when Biden was vice president. == | | | == Judicial Watch Judicial Watch began investigating this matter in 2014 when a wave of UACs swamped the southwest border. Since that time, Judicial Watch has been investigating incidents of violence, drug trafficking, human trafficking, and other criminal activities, as well as whether migrant children were being abused while in U.S. shelters. == == Judicial Watch Judicial Watch has uncovered critical new details in the secret history of the 2020 election: how state government officials—at times interfacing with the Biden presidential campaign—colluded with Twitter, Facebook, and YouTube to censor freedom of speech. The new information raises enormous constitutional and legal questions. It challenges the conventional wisdom that the companies are operating solely as private actors and can remove or ban users of their services as they see fit, with no violation of First Amendment rights. == == Judicial Watch “Judicial Watch is disturbed about the Pentagon’s illicit secrecy about its coordinated attacks on the First Amendment-protected speech of Tucker Carlson,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The fact that we must take the Pentagon to federal court for these documents suggests the agency has something to hide.” == | CLIPS = = | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |

| Hi Peter,

As you may already know, at the end of every quarter, our campaign has to file our fundraising totals with the Federal Elections Commission (FEC). Every dollar we’ve raised becomes public.

[_**We’re about to reach our FEC mid-quarter deadline on May 15th, but we’re short of where we need to be for this point in the quarter. Will you chip in before the deadline to help us close the gap?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29080954/285282503/-563716641?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210512-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjZiYjkyNS04YWIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mnZYnGmUiqH_KcnttCxce11hTxMixT1erp2PLPj5krc=)

After last quarter’s deadline, we learned that one of my Republican opponents, Lisa Scheller, gave _**half a million dollars**_ to her own campaign. As a result, she outraised us during the first quarter of the year, and she has more resources to build her campaign and start reaching voters early.

In a few days, we’ll reach our mid-quarter deadline for the second quarter. If we are going to catch up to Scheller by the end of the quarter, we absolutely must stay on track. But our fundraising is slowing down, and there’s a $25,000 gap between where we are and where we need to be.

[_**Can I count on you to chip in to my campaign before our mid-quarter deadline at midnight on May 15th? The House majority depends on us keeping this seat.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29080955/285282504/-563716641?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210512-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjZiYjkyNS04YWIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mnZYnGmUiqH_KcnttCxce11hTxMixT1erp2PLPj5krc=)

| | **A Statement from Senator Rob Ortt**
Those of us in New York have long recognized Elise Stefanik as a rising star in our party. Her candidacy as Chair of the House Republican Conference demonstrates this confidence is shared by her colleagues in Congress.

Elise is a proven fighter for Upstate New York, a champion for women in government, and an accomplished conservative leader. I am proud to call her a friend, and know our state and nation will be well served with her in this important leadership role.

name: Senator Josh Hawley
subject: Democrats tried to “cancel” me, now they’ll cancel you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
President Trump and I are fighting back--but we need you with us.

_****_****

First the Democrats and Big Tech tried to "cancel" your favorite brands.

Then, Democrats tried to "cancel" me, my fellow Members of Congress and even President Trump.

Now, Democrats tried to "cancel" an entire state because it wouldn't bow to their whims.

**You and I both know, the only thing needing "canceling" is cancel culture.**
**__**
****["CANCEL" CANCEL CULTURE](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=000291c168834f1f86bd7d51c5b54b20&_e=_Nir0mO-b3f9MTy2D_5sKe41xzhzrIVL6nyCX_wLIrNzsZtqTxz26XPtWrnC-GIxZeRRe0pg9BMuIb1i2K8bctPBaH_3lbNRVO2Vj5s6nYWR9iVchXbx2YtbqRlxHjIBcWdiovtlPR7UOWiNHBVJTzjhA4Hl8jUujgihGIJd9yhcuJI8LipEWQdNxmCx_68oiABK2IIRAWaCpEPim_YYNwNRCIff8fX4NWVdo4Fr_iQ8jmbZCSomZ1npams7uhdDeuihSnAWKPZ5XB5Cxwo91U_0W-BtMMs4cYJnyAmzBDA3zIaNB2r1deEvS1nBhWK5LEomi5sD1UWEmyKIHCce9n0s7jd2rVtGHWBOcoW_ejxL-e_1fD4fB2Mtfdc4LD--QeDnGXxUwNUCJy5SGSh1HAQIhQTWo7AQBJ0SIrH5QphO2po8x9atDr3-y_Kf6zUxmBPnbK8ppfrhx2r4JwpcznUuAtuaoAXxJhHSdeDGdJZ4qfwGjoK2oFf3Rasiv6ZyBgK909d4MfHt3179ALfLFRiAPBQ3sMTehlKJbVaS88M%3D)****
---
****

President Trump is making his comeback with the launch of his own social media platform--**and he 's taking cancel culture head on.**

Patriot, we need your help to "cancel" cancel culture once and for all--because no one is safe.

Enjoy baseball?** CANCELED**

Enjoy election integrity?** CANCELED

President Trump and I are fighting back--but we need you with us. So, how about it? Will you stand with President Trump and me as we "cancel" cancel culture?**

****["CANCEL" CANCEL CULTURE](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=000291c168834f1f86bd7d51c5b54b20&_e=_Nir0mO-b3f9MTy2D_5sKe41xzhzrIVL6nyCX_wLIrNzsZtqTxz26XPtWrnC-GIxZeRRe0pg9BMuIb1i2K8bctPBaH_3lbNRVO2Vj5s6nYWR9iVchXbx2YtbqRlxHjIBcWdiovtlPR7UOWiNHBVJTzjhA4Hl8jUujgihGIJd9yhcuJI8LipEWQdNxmCx_68oiABK2IIRAWaCpEPim_YYNwNRCIff8fX4NWVdo4Fr_iQ8jmbZCSomZ1npams7uhdDeuihSnAWKPZ5XB5Cxwo91U_0W-BtMMs4cYJnyAmzBDA3zIaNB2r1deEvS1nBhWK5LEomi5sD1UWEmyKIHCce9tfC7goPsGXea_NQzkOJbOIYVfWpLXMPY1V6sjf_J0twDdU2KNp16inTik0RxJB06uz7O2150cvCZGekJY3ux3-SCv5niFgwc7Tk9-HWcK95ahzyLhS4IluaOjfmSWzwyxZo-05N1BJp7PyyD1vKY4y5JBWv4_IW0RKeNWK7wJIdcuV3JSo8JYq_oE992zWJ-yFEzdzF77fuKJNUDy9im5Y%3D)****

name: Erica Smith
subject: RSVP: Policy is Personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
I REALLY hope I see you at our very first town hall tomorrow!!
#
Policy is personal, y'all!!
It’s personal to me, and it’s personal to people across North Carolina who’re struggling to get by. From Medicare for All to universal broadband, we’re in urgent need of policies that are big enough and bold enough to address the challenges we face.
**That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate — and that’s why I’m launching a special new virtual town hall series that you’re invited to,****y'all!!**
Throughout the month, our campaign will host five virtual town halls that are free and open to the public. I’ll share why the policies I support are personal to me, and invite you to share your stories and ask any questions you may have.
**Our first Policy is Personal town hall event is tomorrow, Thursday, May 13 at 6:00 PM ET, and we’re kicking off the series by talking about Medicare for All. Can you make it?**
[**_To RSVP and view complete event details, click here. I REALLY hope I see you at our very first town hall tomorrow!! All of our town hall events are free and will take place on Zoom._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1058?t=1&akid=82%2E3698%2E2aP-lJ)
**[Yes, I'll RSVP!](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1059?t=2&akid=82%2E3698%2E2aP-lJ)**
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1058?t=3&akid=82%2E3698%2E2aP-lJ)
Starting tomorrow, we’ll talk about the following policies and why they are so personal to me and you:
* Medicare for All — Thursday, May 13, 6:00 PM ET
* Funding HBCUs — Saturday, May 15, 4:00 PM ET
* Universal Broadband — Saturday, May 22, 4:00 PM ET
* Family Farms — Monday, May 24, 6:00 PM ET
* The Green New Deal — Thursday, May 27, 6:00 PM ET

[**_RSVP to tomorrow’s event (and more) by clicking here and reserving your spot right now! Complete event information, including Zoom links, are on the RSVP page._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1058?t=4&akid=82%2E3698%2E2aP-lJ)
**[Yes, I'll RSVP!](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1059?t=5&akid=82%2E3698%2E2aP-lJ)**
This is not a campaign centered around me, it’s a movement centered around all of us. I’m looking forward to seeing and hearing from you in the coming weeks and creating a Government that truly works for all of us.
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210512-82-footer&t=6&refcode2=82_3698_2aP-lJ&akid=82%2E3698%2E2aP-lJ)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=7&akid=82%2E3698%2E2aP-lJ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=82%2E3698%2E2aP-lJ)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Wendy Rogers, Lt Col USAF (ret)
subject: The Big Lie started in AZ
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ****WENDY ROGERS FOR AZ SENATE**
body:
Even establishment RINOs are attacking Donald Trump over his statement. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=eb562207347149d1897c19f1d9d466e5&_e=D-VgSBzEjejpkZUyTNgHi2RIL-i0uuVNgjX6J3q8tE1lPUgcHt-CzkIZEzEIsPSzMMcMrMZ1YlMVGtFgMe5HZug3Q04duSkHGP_pHf0GimuD46ehJX0DLbilNTHH1HNTxVrd1S_FuzMLdq3oNYo0gXbpaY0o62USJMnl8y-t3D5j2f_nWJ4_Zdo24o6xNcIYiwZLUnojA-fbQa3jEqTltsGDx87XjdbydCIvCJNUw8NpFfFys88blX5dLVEpYh3CwJ4WDrGOFQtPNJIVryYhq3Ons6W3t3BCyPmLTXZ5B3gptsGggecbU5UwfCNaQj5m) Dear Friend-- **_“The Fraudulent Presidential Election of 2020 will be, from this day forth, known as THE BIG LIE!”_** That’s what Donald Trump said in a statement -- infuriating the Radical Left and sending the entire “Swamp” into a full-blown panic. Even establishment RINOs are attacking Donald Trump over his statement. Friend, enough is enough. My name is Wendy Rogers. **I’m the pro-Trump firebrand State Senator who cast the deciding vote for election integrity in Arizona.** If you believe we need more conservatives in Congress who will stand up and fight tooth-and-nail for election integrity, then **[I hope I can count on your IMMEDIATE support to help me fight back against George Soros’ attempt to stop the audit.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=eb562207347149d1897c19f1d9d466e5&_e=D-VgSBzEjejpkZUyTNgHi2RIL-i0uuVNgjX6J3q8tE1lPUgcHt-CzkIZEzEIsPSzMMcMrMZ1YlMVGtFgMe5HZn4XzQhecIxTu5Wz7Y2oe7OkDMnarWjOFWs2HKpUO0-co3XnZKusfnoCHIgQnwyVd3LNERLrWPhgStGQtzhuODfBR22pVpVcVyImqjneq9dEMPDWDcFsmUlanl_rYHu2yggMCLTtRx3g8Bp8FTt0Xrenp9khlY-qUiBLPNoee-SoY9tfQqA-2T09ebb_u4E4X9XVmOUG_SABtYBnnQZypLpWv2DbEqHtDz96D7pOB1fd)** Friend, I’m doing everything I can to bring transparency to the 2020 election. But the ENTIRE Radical Left is making an all-out effort to slow down, disrupt and STOP the audit of the ballots in Maricopa County. **The Democrats already deployed more than 100 high-powered lawyers to Arizona in a desperate effort to block the audit and stop the truth from getting out to the American people.** But thanks to the help and support of patriots like you, the Democrats more than 100 attorneys failed to convince a judge to stop the audit. And as of the writing of this email, _**the audit of the Maricopa County ballots is moving forward.**_ But Friend, this fight is FAR from over. **Bankrolled by George Soros’ billions, the Democrats are already plotting their next move to try to stop the audit in Maricopa County.** And the Fake News Media and “woke” corporations are ramping up their effort to keep the American people in the dark about what is taking place in Arizona. But with your help, I’m confident we can finish the audit and make sure George Soros and his cronies NEVER steal another election again in this country. **[So please, chip in the maximum donation you can afford to help me keep up the fight for election integrity in Arizona.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=eb562207347149d1897c19f1d9d466e5&_e=D-VgSBzEjejpkZUyTNgHi2RIL-i0uuVNgjX6J3q8tE1lPUgcHt-CzkIZEzEIsPSzMMcMrMZ1YlMVGtFgMe5HZufFqVq314fJRvOd78ym49YFYQDk7fIxGqpWJMZYmzNi9-tmkbWjPDANtE9z9BaPbLTxWh3PZttD_qzUTVpzv1wt91lC16XWd1eD2kHlkyDhp-GLtu8xofNFnAJGhKOMI_3JujResFuhF10QenmyxjQH12Pu1FTCgOSOPbrA3SssIZMDZbrYOLqm82rGQEPZYaqV2I93jk_l20kzZcaA_XRHhUmOyiv71hhhqVxASG6R)** Rest assured, I won’t stop fighting for election integrity -- no matter how vicious and nasty the attacks get. But Friend, I need to know you’ll be standing with me in my corner every step up the fight. **So please don’t hesitate.** **The Democrats are moving FAST to try to stop the audit.** I need your help to shine a bright public spotlight on the massive amount of fraud that took place on November 3. **[So please chip in a donation to help send a loud-and-clear message to the Democrats and Radical Left that grassroots conservatives are serious about protecting the integrity of our election process.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=eb562207347149d1897c19f1d9d466e5&_e=D-VgSBzEjejpkZUyTNgHi2RIL-i0uuVNgjX6J3q8tE1lPUgcHt-CzkIZEzEIsPSzMMcMrMZ1YlMVGtFgMe5HZvTLZ-m_WJ7MjB4MYKaDfn90x4m7LaK0AFtP4O9eWKLbWeao6R9vzXr5AzWRWgQlVJLLczm7Sji8U1x6d9o0kOJVtdCpfY66PVlss_EtehnrsR3zY8ZiVh0ljzvJlD5WX_MJHH8hqBWWCud42hL3ajEyxP_SEQS3ZH1Nctm0l9gQ8r0W2zhbc48iVQj90SRplJqM7OpRmiugPSCmgFE2Pi3G6gEvsm8PTR5UkrhPHz7L)** Thank you in advance for your support. _**I’ll be sure and keep you updated from the front lines of the fight.**_ **__** Thank you and God bless you. Wendy Rogers, Lt Col USAF (ret) Arizona State Senator Arizona's 6th Legislative District [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=eb562207347149d1897c19f1d9d466e5&_e=D-VgSBzEjejpkZUyTNgHi2RIL-i0uuVNgjX6J3q8tE1lPUgcHt-CzkIZEzEIsPSzMMcMrMZ1YlMVGtFgMe5HZqlC3mWq2XxZGwfwBZc4vXcAREM5GVyddORtFJSUXhXWuZewQ_sRFRrWaqPorV8TVFYPjYDITAMhs3ODIfWnBol4qcEVUmd7Ux34S7ll6npBkcC80_NjVebbAZ0f_511-vStCyPRHoiGG9WlSuVsdXxAk3E7yJPPe4xJEC_0d204apbFGloO8_nQEZoh0YZ0gmsPdk44ZfbwYEOTe3q0JjiI2m4pNA2gSGBMoI_Utiub)

**PAID FOR BY ****WENDY ROGERS FOR AZ SENATE**
